title: Request - Dark mode
excerpt:
Hi! 
It’s easy our team would love a dark mode option. Much like the one for the timeline view but for whole of Monday. :smile:

posts.author: AlexJ (Alexander Johdet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
It’s easy our team would love a dark mode option. Much like the one for the timeline view but for whole of Monday.

posts.author: Lobster (Ethyn Birch)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this! First thing I do when setting up a dashboard is turn on Dark Mode… Good call!

posts.author: cwiassoc (Andrew Beckwith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Check out the Chrome Extension “Dark Reader.”

chrome.google.com

Dark Reader

Dark mode for every website. Take care of your eyes, use dark theme for night and daily browsing.

posts.author: ViteEris (Eris)
posts.cookedHtml: I also would like to request a Dark Mode-- it’s one thing to use a third party web extension like Dark Reader or custom CSSes, but these only apply to the web app and I’d like to extend this feature request to Dark Modes available also for the desktop and mobile apps, which cannot rely on such extensions.

posts.author: AlexJ (Alexander Johdet)
posts.cookedHtml: @ViteEris I’m doing the same. Running stylish on my browser just to get somewhat close to a dark mode. The weird thing is that they have a dark mode for the timeline and not for the entire board. It looks so good tbh!

posts.author: JustinJ (Justin Junioous)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AlexJ, @ViteEris, @cwiassoc, and @Lobster,

Thank you for submitting your feedback. Glad you all found a workaround using the web extension. That is Awesome! I will probably use this myself.

This is something that we are considering and I will be happy to pass this along to our product team for review. Feel free to continue to share your thoughts.

Justin

posts.author: Ster (Slava)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, same here, wanted to switch to the night mode, assuming it would be in monday.com. Such a pity to use an extension. Can’t wait to have it embedded into monday.com!

posts.author: Iskandar (iskandar@bwefardeboer.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! Also on the Mac and iOS app.

posts.author: AlexJ (Alexander Johdet)
posts.cookedHtml: Just tested Dark Reader and its wonderful. Thanks for the tip!

posts.author: cwiassoc (Andrew Beckwith)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, I fell in love with it too. Someone from the Monday staff told me about it, and now I use it everywhere.

posts.author: kyrinfield (Kyrin Field)
posts.cookedHtml: I would very much like to see with feature added as well.

posts.author: jonp (jon pell)
posts.cookedHtml: If there is only one change I could see, it would be this. I have abandoned several other apps and services that are otherwise quite functional just because they insist on making me stare at a giant, low watt light bulb all day.

posts.author: JasonSalyers (Jason Salyers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please, please, please make this happen.

Thanks,

J.

posts.author: lafavellc.com (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Almost a year and no one has created the request for Dark Mode?

posts.author: P.K.Amada (Patrick Kuipers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dark Mode is only Working on Dashboard.

For my Normal Boards i still need to use Firefox to get the ( Dark Mode)

posts.author: Oswapreneur (Oswaldo GC)
posts.cookedHtml: You are AWESOME!!! Thank you so much for the tip!!

posts.author: JustinVR_SCF (Justin van Ryneveld)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Yes - we spend long hours on our computers and have dark mode activated on most of our other programs… and then we open Monday.com and it’s like a blinding light in the darkness.
Please give us a dark mode.
Cheers,
Justin

posts.author: Geoff (Geoff Sheerar)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please add dark mode!

posts.author: kwulster (Kathryn Wulster)
posts.cookedHtml: Pretty sure this is an option under settings on individual boards though when you log out and back in it resets

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: No, not an option without a browser extension right now.

posts.author: kwulster (Kathryn Wulster)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2020-06-15 at 10.22.55 AM1880×1116 150 KB
Screen Shot 2020-06-15 at 10.23.01 AM1880×1116 142 KB

Not for main board but calendar and kanban views have a dark mode

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
They just introduced dark mode. You can activatie via monday.labs!

For the mobile app you have to email Monday for activation.

Totally like the dark mode!

/#/t/10157

posts.author: AlexJ (Alexander Johdet)
posts.cookedHtml: Testing it out right now and sending this to my team! Thank you for doing this no more 3rd party extensions @Eltjo

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t have the option in Monday.labs, what am I missing?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlexJ

You can easily activate Dark mode in your account by selecting your profile picture / initials in the bottom left hand corner of the platform and selecting change theme from the menu!

image1108×406 30.5 KB

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
